quality.rationale: 需结合比安基恒等式、迹运算与牛顿流体连续性方程进行多步推导，物理逻辑链条完整且紧扣实验观测约束

origin.question:
Problem 13.1. A somewhat generalized form of the Einstein field equations is$$R_{\mu 
u} - a g_{\mu 
u} R = 8 \pi T_{\mu 
u}$$where $\alpha$ is some dimensionless constant. Show that if $\alpha$ is not $ rac{1}{2}$ the field equations disagree with experiment, even in the Newtonian limit.
